name: dream-big
description: Bob Goff's Dream Big — actionable toolkit for identifying what you truly want, overcoming fear, taking action, and pursuing your biggest ambitions with community support
useCase: Clarify your dreams, overcome fear and perfectionism, build a supportive community, start before you're ready, and persist through setbacks
knownRisks: Goff's approach is faith-informed (Christian) — some readers may find the religious framing off-putting
The 'start before you're ready' advice can be dangerous in high-stakes situations (medical, financial)
Not all dreams are meant to be pursued — the book may encourage unrealistic ambitions in some readers
